reviewChecklist.title: Platform i18n review checklist
items: Replace visible labels with translation keys in `platform.*` namespace.
Use locale-aware formatting for date, relative time and currency.
Check sidebar, hero titles/subtitles and CTA labels.
Validate microcopy tone and vocabulary by locale (FR/EN/ES/PT/DE/AR).

about.title: About
about.description: Discover Bro World, our mission, our vision, and the measurable commitments that shape each release.

hero.title: Building a reliable and human-centered operating system for teams
hero.subtitle: Bro World helps operations, product, and support teams coordinate work in one shared context so they can decide faster and execute with confidence.
paragraphs: We designed Bro World as a practical workspace where strategic goals and day-to-day actions stay connected. Teams can track decisions, document context, and keep everyone aligned without multiplying disconnected tools.
Our roadmap is guided by one principle: each feature must reduce friction in real workflows. That means better visibility, fewer handoffs, and clearer ownership from intake to delivery.
bullets: Unified visibility across operations, communication, and delivery milestones.
Reliable governance with role-based access, auditability, and service continuity.
Progressive adoption model that supports both small teams and multi-entity organizations.

missionCards.title: Our mission
missionCards.description: Enable every team to improve operational clarity with simple, connected, and actionable tools.
paragraphs: Operational excellence should not require heavy process overhead. We focus on clear interfaces and practical workflows so teams can move from intent to impact quickly.
By centralizing key signals, tasks, and decisions, Bro World reduces ambiguity and helps teams prioritize the work that matters most.
bullets: Shorter coordination cycles between departments.
Shared understanding of priorities and constraints.
Actionable reporting that supports better decision-making.

missionCards.title: Our vision
missionCards.description: Create a digital environment where information flows quickly, stays trustworthy, and empowers sustainable collaboration.
paragraphs: We believe modern organizations need tools that scale in complexity without sacrificing usability. Data should be understandable, traceable, and easy to act on.
Our long-term ambition is to become the reference collaboration layer for distributed teams that need reliability and speed at the same time.
bullets: Transparent collaboration across sites, time zones, and functions.
Secure-by-default architecture for sensitive business processes.
Continuous product evolution informed by measurable user outcomes.

metrics.label: monthly active users
metrics.context: Adoption growth sustained over the last 12 months across multiple industries.

metrics.label: average uptime
metrics.context: Observed availability across production environments and critical services.

metrics.label: customer satisfaction
metrics.context: Average score collected through post-resolution and quarterly feedback loops.

timeline.title: Foundation phase
timeline.description: We shipped the first collaboration core focused on shared task visibility and role-based access.

timeline.title: Scale & reliability
timeline.description: The platform expanded to support higher traffic, stronger governance, and richer integrations.
highlights: Released structured workflow templates for operations teams.

timeline.title: Intelligence & acceleration
timeline.description: We are investing in assistive capabilities that help teams prioritize, detect risks early, and automate repetitive steps.

cta.title: Want to go deeper?
cta.description: Talk with our team to map your priorities and identify the fastest path to operational impact with Bro World.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find quick and practical answers to the most frequent questions about Bro World.

hero.title: An enriched FAQ to move faster
hero.subtitle: Filter by category, search specific topics, and access operational guidance in a few seconds.

search.label: Search in FAQ
search.placeholder: Example: sign in, permissions, notifications, security...

categories.label: Account
categories.description: Authentication, profile settings, and user preferences.

categories.label: Platform
categories.description: Features, workflows, and day-to-day usage tips.

categories.label: Security
categories.description: Access control, data handling, and compliance practices.

items.question: How do I sign in to my account?
items.answer: Use your username or business email on the Login page, then enter your password to start a secure session.
detailsParagraphs: If your organization uses centralized identity, your administrator may have configured additional checks such as SSO or multi-factor authentication.
If login attempts fail repeatedly, reset your password and verify that your account has not been temporarily locked by policy.
bullets: Use a company-managed email whenever possible.
Avoid sharing credentials between team members.
Contact your admin if your account is deactivated.

items.question: Can I customize notifications?
items.answer: Yes. Notification channels and frequency can be adjusted in user settings for each workflow.
detailsParagraphs: You can choose which events trigger email, in-app, or digest notifications. This helps reduce noise while keeping critical alerts visible.
Team-level defaults can be overridden depending on your role and governance settings.
bullets: Set quiet hours for non-critical updates.
Keep critical incident alerts enabled at all times.

items.question: How is my data protected?
items.answer: Data is encrypted in transit, access is controlled through roles, and sensitive operations are logged for auditability.
detailsParagraphs: Bro World applies least-privilege access patterns and continuous monitoring across key services.
Security controls are reviewed regularly to align with evolving compliance and customer requirements.
bullets: Role-based access and scoped permissions.
Traceable activity logs on sensitive actions.
Infrastructure hardening and proactive monitoring.

items.question: Is the platform available in multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes. You can change the interface language from the top navigation bar at any time.
detailsParagraphs: Localization coverage is continuously expanded based on product usage and customer demand.
Administrators can define a default locale while keeping personal language preferences for each user.
bullets: Language switch is immediate in the UI.
No logout required to apply locale changes.

emptyState.title: No results for your current filters
emptyState.description: Try broadening your search terms, selecting another category, or contacting support for personalized guidance.
emptyState.suggestion: Tip: use short keywords such as "login", "security", or "notifications".

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Need guidance, technical support, or strategic advice? Reach out through the channel that fits your context.

hero.title: A clear contact point for every need
hero.subtitle: Our support, success, and partnership teams coordinate to provide fast responses and transparent follow-up.

channels.label: Email support
channels.details: Best for detailed requests, attachments, and asynchronous follow-up.

channels.label: Phone hotline
channels.details: Recommended for urgent blockers requiring immediate triage.

channels.label: Workspace chat
channels.details: Ideal for day-to-day questions and quick clarification with the support desk.

availability.title: Availability and escalation
availability.description: Our response windows are designed to balance speed, depth of analysis, and predictable follow-up.
escalationBullets: Immediate acknowledgement with tracking ID and owner assignment.
Priority-based triage with visibility on expected response times.
Regular progress updates until mitigation and full resolution.

form.title: Contact form
form.description: Share enough context so we can route your request to the right team and reply with actionable guidance.
